title: Discs Where Discs Shouldn't Be (Resource Pack)
description: Want all the wonderful music of DWDSB without installing a mod? Use this Resource Pack instead!
body:
DWDSB Resource Pack

This Resource Pack serves as an unmodded alternative to the Discs Where Discs Shouldn't Be. Just like the mod, this Resource Pack adds 14 unique music discs composed by Sir Thomas Jakuus, with texture art by Codewyrm. As a note, this Resource Pack will be kept up to date with all new Minecraft versions, but as long as you are using version 1.16 and up, this pack should work with them all! Unlike the mod, this Resource Pack only reskins preexisting music discs already within the game. All 14 music discs are written and composed by Sir Thomas Jakuus and can be found on his SoundCloud! Each disc takes on similar themes to those already in Minecraft, making them a great addition to any world. The list below shows what music discs are reskinned into Sir Thomas's music.

  • 11 becomes wave
  • 13 becomes lost
  • blocks becomes watched
  • cat becomes rest
  • chirp becomes mirror
  • far becomes rain
  • mall becomes alone
  • mellohi becomes bean
  • otherside becomes lyre
  • Pigstep becomes ember
  • stal becomes star
  • strad becomes rave
  • wait becomes waltz
  • ward becomes sunset

If you want to keep the wonderful works of C418 and Lena Raine in your game, and want the mod's complete experience (including 14 custom music discs, the Copper Whistle, and additional features) visit the mod page!
